accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; accurately describes the ban and waiver conditions.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill limits uranium importation from Russia.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Does not mention that the bill amends the USEC Privatization Act, omitting the legislative mechanism.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes waiver conditions and the two grounds for waiver.

effective_dates.why: States waiver termination by Jan 1 2028 and ban termination Dec 31 2040.

major_provisions_covered.why: Omits the anti-circumvention provision (uranium swapped to evade ban), the annual import caps under waivers, the congressional notification requirement, and the exceptions for DOE national security and non-uranium isotopes.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
